page.title: Izushi Kokoro no Ōomi no Mikoto

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出石心大臣命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|children={{ill|Ōhesoki|qid=Q106106718|1=Ōhesoki}}|father={{ill|Q108933345|qid=Q108933345|1=Omine no Mikoto}}}}
{{Infobox noble | name = Izushi Kokoro no Ōomi no Mikoto | image = | caption = | period = [[Ancient Japan]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Izushi Kokoro no Mikoto, Itsushi Kokoro no Mikoto, Itsushi Kokoro no Ōomi no Mikoto | posthumous_name = | divine_name = | dharma_name = | resting_place = | court_titles = [[Minister (ancient Japan)|Ōomi]] | lord = [[Kōshō Emperor]] | clan = Ancestor of the [[Hozumi clan|Hozumi no Omi]] and [[Mononobe clan|Mononobe no Muraji]] | parents = Father: [[Hiko Yasugi no Mikoto]]<ref name="tenson">"Tenson Honki," in the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}.</ref>; Mother: Awamikawa Kare Hime<ref name="tenson"/> | siblings = [[Ōyaguchi Ne Ōomi no Mikoto]]<ref name="tenson"/>; [[Izumo Shiko Ōomi no Mikoto]]<ref name="tenson"/>; [[Kami Ōne|Ōne no Mikoto]]<ref name="tenson"/> | spouse = Arakawa Kodate Hime<ref name="tenson"/> | children = [[Ōyaguchi Sukune no Mikoto]], [[Ōminakuchi Sukune no Mikoto]]<ref name="tenson"/> }} {{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 出石心大臣命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = {{ill|Ancient Japan|ja|上古|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 古代|1=Ancient history|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q41493}} | 生誕 = Unknown | 死没 = Unknown | 改名 = | 別名 = 出石心命、稜威石心命、稜威石心大臣命 | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = {{ill|Omi (title)|lt=Omi (title)|lt=Ōomi|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōomi|qq=}} | 主君 = {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}} | 氏族 = {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}・{{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|qid=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} ancestors | 父母 = Father: {{ill|Hiko Yasugi no Mikoto|ja|彦湯支命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiko Yasugi no Mikoto|1=Hikoyuki no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119380402}}<ref name="tenson">"Tenson Honki," from {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}.</ref>, Mother: {{ill|Awami Kawakarehime|ja|淡海川枯姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awami Kawakarehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/> | 兄弟 = {{ill|Ōyaguchi no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja|大矢口根大臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyaguchi no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/>, {{ill|Izumo Shikō no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja|出雲醜大臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Shikō no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/>, {{ill|Kami Ōne|lt=Kami Ōne|lt=Ōne no Mikoto|ja|大禰命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōne no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/> | 妻 = {{ill|Arakawa no Kotatehime|ja|新河小楯姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakawa no Kotatehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/> | 子 = {{ill|Ōyaguchi Sukune no Mikoto|ja|大矢口宿禰命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyaguchi Sukune no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="tenson"/>, {{ill|Ōmizukuchi Sukune no Mikoto|ja|大水口宿禰命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmizukuchi Sukune no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大水口宿禰|1=Oomizuguchi no Sukune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11436785}}<ref name="tenson"/> | 特記事項 = }}
'''Izushi Kokoro no Ōomi no Mikoto''' (出石心大臣命, 生没年不詳) was an ancient Japanese nobleman, regarded as an ancestor of the {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}} and {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|qid=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}}.
== Overview ==
According to the "Tennō Honki" chapter of the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}, Izushi Kokoro no Mikoto became an {{ill|Omi (title)|lt=Omi (title)|lt=Ōomi|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōomi|qq=}} in the first year of Emperor Kōshō’s reign during autumn. The "Tenson Honki" chapter corroborates this and adds that he served as a priest for the {{ill|Ōkami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10937139}} at {{ill|Isonokami Shrine|en|Isonokami Shrine|qid=Q708859|lt=Isonokami Shrine|1=Isonokami Jingū}}.
== Genealogy ==
The "Tenson Honki" identifies Izushi Kokoro no Ōomi no Mikoto as the great-grandson of {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10949054}} and the sibling of {{ill|Izumo Shikō no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja|出雲醜大臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Shikō no Ōomi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kami Ōne|lt=Kami Ōne|lt=Ōne no Mikoto|ja|大禰命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōne no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. His maternal lineage is traced to {{ill|Awami Kawakarehime|ja|淡海川枯姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awami Kawakarehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with no conflicting traditions recorded.
== References ==
